name: Beijing Wanji Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Wanji Technology Co., Ltd. provides intelligent transportation systems in China. The company offers ETC products, such as on board units, release devices, and roadside units, as well as V2X, a product that connects Internet of vehicles and automatic drive; and weigh-in-motion products, including toll-by-weight, overweight measurement, direct enforcement, instrument panel, LiDAR axle recognizer, and integrated management platform. It also provides LiDAR range of products for use in traffic condition survey, vehicle detection outline size detection and measurement, and vehicle classification systems; and electronic registration identification systems, which include RFID readers and antennas. In addition, the company offers big data products for use in overloading management, traffic, and logistics applications. Beijing Wanji Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
